hero.title: Control your entire WordPress site from AI
hero.subtitle: StoreMCP connects WordPress & WooCommerce to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor and any MCP-compatible AI client. Products, orders, pages, analytics — all through natural language.

features.title: What you can do
features.subtitle: Every operation you need, exposed as a single tool call.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From install to AI control in under five minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Install StoreMCP from wordpress.org. Activate and generate your API key.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add your MCP server URL to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any MCP client.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ask anything. Your AI assistant now has full access to your WordPress site.

woocommerce.title: Built for WooCommerce
woocommerce.desc: The most comprehensive MCP server for WordPress & WooCommerce. From product management to advanced sales analytics, StoreMCP covers every operation you need.

compatible.title: Compatible with
compatible.subtitle: Works with every MCP-capable AI client in use today.

opensource.title: Open source core
opensource.desc: StoreMCP's free tier is open source and available on wordpress.org. We believe in transparency and community.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free forever for personal sites. Pro for stores. Agency for fleets.

free.name: Free
free.desc: For personal sites and small blogs

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For stores and businesses that need full control

agency.name: Agency
agency.desc: For agencies and freelancers managing multiple clients

footer.tagline: AI control center for WordPress & WooCommerce.

newsletter.title: Get updates on new features
newsletter.subtitle: No spam. Release notes and the occasional tip.
